books.author: George Orwell
books.description: The novel focuses on Winston Smith, who works for the Ministry of Truth, a branch of the government responsible for the dissemination of information. Each day begins for all citizens with a Two Minutes' Hate session, which promotes fear and paranoia in order to ensure that people follow the wishes of Big Brother.

books.title: The Hunger Games
books.author: Suzanne Collins
books.description: As punishment for a failed rebellion 74 years earlier, each district must annually select two tributes, one boy and one girl between the ages of 12 to 18, to fight to the death in the Hunger Games until only one survivor remains. The event is televised nationwide.

books.title: Stranger in a Strange Land
books.author: Robert A. Heinlein
books.description: Stranger in a Strange Land, classic science fiction novel by American writer Robert A. Heinlein, published in 1961. The work centres on a human raised on Mars who comes to Earth and challenges customs relating to love, death, religion, and money.

books.title: The Poppy War
books.author: R.F Kuang
books.description: Fang Runin is a war orphan in the Nikan Empire whose foster parents employ her in their opium smuggling. She studies for a national test to escape an arranged marriage and places first in her province, which sends her north to Sinegard, the imperial capital and home of the military academy.

books.title: Shadow and Bone
books.author: Leigh Bardugo
books.description: The novel follows Alina Starkov, a teenage orphan who grows up in the Russia-inspired land of Ravka when, one day, she unexpectedly harnesses a power she never knew she had, becoming a target of intrigue and violence.

books.title: A Game of Thrones
books.author: George R.R Martin
books.description: In the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros, House Stark and House Lannister influence the political fate of the continent. In Westeros' far north, an illegitimate son of House Stark joins a group maintaining a giant wall of ice to protect Westeros from raiders and a group of mythical enemies.

books.title: Dracula
books.author: Bram Stoker
books.description: The plot unfolds with Jonathan Harker, an English solicitor, journeying to Dracula's castle in the Carpathian Mountains to assist the Count with a real estate purchase in London. Harker's visit reveals the Count's vampiric nature and marks the beginning of a battle between Dracula and a group determined to stop him.

books.title: Tender is the Flesh
books.author: Agustina Bazterrica
books.description: Tender Is the Flesh portrays a society in which a virus has contaminated all animal meat. Because of the lack of animal flesh, cannibalism becomes legal. Marcos, a human meat supplier, is conflicted by this new society, and tortured by his own personal losses.

books.title: Lapvona
books.author: Ottessa Moshfegh
books.description: a 13-year-old deformed boy named Marek lives in a cruel medieval fiefdom with his abusive father, Jude. Their lives are shaped by religious superstition and the whims of the depraved governor, Lord Villiam, and his corrupt priest, Father Barnabas.
